# crypto_keys corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === SSH Public Key (RSA) ===
# expect: SSH Public Key (RSA)
ssh-rsa AAAAB3NzaC1yc2EAAAADAQABAAABAQDZ0Pl4cQwExampleNotARealKeyAAAAAAAABBBBBBBBCCCCCCCCDDDDDDDDEEEEEEEEFFFFFFFFGGGGGGGG== user@host

# === SSH Public Key (Ed25519) ===
# expect: SSH Public Key (Ed25519)
ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIExampleNotARealEd25519PublicKeyAAAABBBBCCCCDDDDEEEEFFFF user@host

# === SSH Public Key (DSS) ===
# expect: SSH Public Key (DSS)
ssh-dss AAAAB3NzaC1kc3MAAAEBExampleNotARealDssPublicKeyAAAAAAAABBBBBBBBCCCCCCCCDDDDDDDDEEEEEEEE== user@host

# === SSH Public Key (ECDSA) ===
# expect: SSH Public Key (ECDSA)
ecdsa-sha2-nistp256 AAAAE2VjZHNhLXNoYTItbmlzdHAExampleNotARealEcdsaPublicKeyAAAABBBBCCCCDDDDEEEE= user@host

# === SSH Public Key (FIDO Ed25519) ===
# expect: SSH Public Key (FIDO Ed25519)
sk-ssh-ed25519@openssh.com AAAAGnNrLXNzaC1lZDI1NTE5QG9wZW5zc2guY29tExampleNotARealFidoKeyAAAABBBB= user@host

# === SSH Public Key (FIDO ECDSA) ===
# expect: SSH Public Key (FIDO ECDSA)
sk-ecdsa-sha2-nistp256@openssh.com AAAAInNrLWVjZHNhLXNoYTItbmlzdHAyNTZAb3BlbnNzaExampleAAAA= user@host

# === SSH2 Public Key Block ===
# expect: SSH2 Public Key Block
---- BEGIN SSH2 PUBLIC KEY ----

# === PuTTY Private Key File ===
# expect: PuTTY Private Key File
PuTTY-User-Key-File-3: ssh-ed25519

# === Encrypted PKCS#8 Private Key ===
# expect: Encrypted PKCS#8 Private Key
-----BEGIN ENCRYPTED PRIVATE KEY-----

# === PEM Encrypted Header ===
# expect: PEM Encrypted Header
Proc-Type: 4,ENCRYPTED

# === OpenVPN Static Key ===
# expect: OpenVPN Static Key
-----BEGIN OpenVPN Static key V1-----

# === X.509 Certificate ===
# expect: X.509 Certificate
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----

# === X.509 Certificate Request ===
# expect: X.509 Certificate Request
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE REQUEST-----

# === PGP Public Key Block ===
# expect: PGP Public Key Block
-----BEGIN PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----

# === DKIM Private Key Record ===
# expect: DKIM Private Key Record
v=DKIM1; k=rsa; p=MIGfMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBAQUAA4GNADCBiQKBgQExampleNotARealDkimPublicKeyAAAABBBBCCCCDDDDEEEEFFFFGGGGHHHH
